name: tsc-projects
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash; fi; if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh; fi; export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; uv python install "$(tr -d "\n" < .python-version)"; uv sync --frozen; bun install --frozen-lockfile'
